message:
[bd-dqds] Fix wish memory leak and output channel type

- Removed unbounded stdout/stderr buffers from Session struct which caused indefinite memory growth.
- Changed Session output_tx to UnboundedSender to allow synchronous writes (std::io::Write) without blocking_send, matching handler usage.
- Updated test_output_helpers to verify output via channel inspection.
- Updated Session methods (write, write_stderr, exit, close) to use correct channel sending logic.
